agent_cli_controls: stdout is data; diagnostics are encoded in JSON fields
run-stage defaults to dry-run work-order creation
doctor is non-destructive unless --deep is requested

commands.contract: Show one-screen runtime state and latest receipt/handoff.
commands.name: status

commands.contract: Run bounded boot smoke and surface boot verdict/receipt.
commands.name: boot

commands.contract: Verify critical operator-surface and boot artifacts.
commands.name: verify

commands.contract: Run non-destructive diagnostic checks with JSON evidence and remediations.
commands.name: doctor

commands.contract: Prepare a bounded governed stage work order by default; execute only if a real stage runner is installed.
commands.name: run-stage

commands.contract: Dry-run latest handoff continuation without executing new work.
commands.name: replay

commands.contract: Create a compressed complete OS ZIP plus checksum sidecar.
commands.name: export

fail_closed_rules: run-stage --execute fails if no stage runner exists
no command turns missing gates into pass
purpose: Add diagnostic and stage-preparation commands to the compact MetaBlooms operator surface while preserving fail-closed governance.
research_bindings: agent-first CLI reviewability guidance for explicit scope and evidence packs
